title: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch USW-Industrial
description: The UniFi Industrial Switch is a managed, plenum-rated, Gigabit Layer 2 switch with auto-sensing 802.3bt PoE++ support Eight ports offer auto-sensing 802.3af/at/bt PoE to provide up to 60W of power (per port) to power multiple devices on the network The fanless UniFi Industrial Switch is plenum-rated so it can be installed in a horizontal or vertical orientation in plenum spaces. Its die-cast aluminum enclosure has a black, powder coated finish for increased durability and greater resistance to corrosion. It can operate at full 450W power in environments up to 50 ° C The USW-Industrial powers a variety of products, including the UniFi AC Mesh AP, UniFi Video Camera G4 Pro, and multiple UniFi LED Panels, which use 802.3at PoE+ A single instance of the UniFi Controller running in the cloud can manage multiple UniFi sites within a centralized interface. Each site is logically separated and has its own network monitoring, configuration, maps, statistics, and admin accounts
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (10) 10/100/1000Mbps Power Power type Mains power (230V) PoE type PoE-Out (only) PoE-Out standards 802.3af, 802.3at, 802.3bt PoE Out ports 8 PoE budget [W] 450 Max. power consumption [W] 20 Power via connector/terminal 230V AC Physical characteristics Design Industry Fans No Chassis design Metal Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 60 Width [mm] 254 Height [mm] 60 Depth [mm] 235 General Switchning capacity [Gbps] 20 MAC address table 16000 Jumbo frame [Bytes] 9000 Packet forwarding rate [Mpps] 14,9
